sections.paragraph:
(“hearing with acceptance”), pr.n. Simeon (Gr. Συμεών); borne by-

(1) a son of Jacob, by Leah ( Gen 29:33), the ancestor of the tribe of that name, the cities of which are mentioned as situated in the territory of the tribe of Judah, -Jos 19:19.-(2) Ezr 10:31. Patron. is שִׁמְעֹנִי Num 25:14.
